_comment_colors: PROCESS: neutral-* is the raw grayscale ramp. Semantic tokens (surface-*, text-*, border-*) alias into it via var(--colors-neutral-N)) so the ramp stays the single source of truth. Status tokens (success/warning/danger/info) each ship a base + -bg/-border/-text trio for blocks like alert and badge.
_comment_spacing: PROCESS: Visit https://utopia.fyi/space/calculator/ to generate fluid spaces. Paste the resulting keys/values below.
_comment_typography: PROCESS: Visit https://utopia.fyi/type/calculator/ to configure your fluid scale. Set your min/max viewport and base font sizes, then paste the generated step keys/values below.
_comment_layout: PROCESS: 'measure' caps prose/content width (used by .center and typographic elements). 'wrapper-max-width' caps macro page-section width (used by .wrapper) and is deliberately a separate, wider value — the two primitives solve different problems and should not share a default.
